controls.abstention_policy: Gan 6-month seizure-free threshold; use no seizure frequency reference only when no seizure frequency information is present
controls.few_shot_policy: BootstrapFewShot with semantic frequency and evidence-support metric

hypothesis: BootstrapFewShot on the direct Gan S0 path with the semantic_frequency_with_evidence optimizer metric improves monthly/Purist accuracy versus the synthesis exact-label objective while preserving evidence support and unchanged gan_frequency_deterministic_v1 reporting.
metric_caveats: Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing.
Raw exact, normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, and evidence support are diagnostic.
The optimizer metric semantic_frequency_with_evidence is optimizer-facing only and does not replace gan_frequency_deterministic_v1 benchmark scoring.
This config changes optimizer reward balance toward monthly/Purist semantics while holding the benchmark-facing scorer contract fixed.
Compare against verify-repair v2 and synthesis exact-label BootstrapFewShot anchors on the same capped validation slice before full validation.
This capped validation config is not published Gan benchmark reproduction.
